violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream maker have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.Beverage station shelves 2.Cabinets at soda fountain(observed rodent droppings) 3.Shelves in the kitchen area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
The walls in the back storage area is in poor repair(observed a hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The floors throughout kitchen area under and behind equipment and shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
